editorial_reasoning.calendar_tier: TIER 1 — NFL Draft Day 1 (Round 1 tonight at 8 PM)
editorial_reasoning.dominant_topic: NFL Draft leads — Tier 1 calendar event confirmed by volume and timing

candidates_considered.hook: Fernando Mendoza #1 pick, Cowboys trade rumors, chaos expected
Coach missing Day 3 of draft for counseling after Arizona resort photos

candidates_considered.story: Thunder Beat Suns Again, Jalen Williams Injured
candidates_considered.hook: SGA 37 points, up 2-0, but Jalen Williams hurt
Called out ref James Williams by name, WWE comparison
Broke Manu's Spurs record, only 2nd player to play all 82 without starting

stories.headline: NFL Draft Night Is Finally Here — And Nobody Knows What Happens After Pick #1
stories.editorial_direction: Fernando Mendoza is locked in at #1 to Vegas, but after that it's chaos. Cowboys getting calls about moving up, Jets have their guy at #2, Arizona could take a RB. Go deep on the draft day energy, the chaos, the trades brewing.

tweets.text:
Final. Mock. Draft. 

Tons of fun doing this one with @JFowlerESPN 

https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/48542761/2026-nfl-mock-draft-miller-fowler-first-round-32-picks-final-predictions-buzz-intel

Here's my final mock draft, which is heavy on OL, WR and pass rushers 

Looking forward to a fun night ahead: 

https://www.espn.com/nfl/draft2026/story/_/id/48543956/2026-nfl-mock-draft-final-intel-predictions-yates-kiper-round-1

Seahawks GM John Schneider told reporters this week that, with Seattle entering this draft with only four picks, he would like to trade back from the team's No. 32 selection in the first round to accumulate more picks. The Seahawks are hardly the only team near the end of the first round willing to move back; others are as well.

key_stats: Fernando Mendoza -20000 favorite at #1 to Raiders
Cowboys have no assurances George Pickens will show up
Seahawks want to trade back from #32
Draft shortened clock to 8 minutes per pick in first round
research_notes.historical_context: First draft in Pittsburgh since 1948. Second time ever in Steel City. College GameDay broadcasting from draft site for first time.
draft_chaos: Cowboys getting trade calls about moving up
Arizona could shock with RB at #3
Ty Simpson expected in first round
cross_connections: President Bill Clinton crashed Cowboys press conference mid-draft prep
Saints OC Doug Nussmeier excused to watch son Garrett get drafted
financial_absurdity: Caleb Banks broke foot at Combine but expected early June clearance
Cowboys franchise-tagged George Pickens with no long-term talks
research_notes.internet_sentiment: Draft buzz is through the roof — everyone has theories but nobody knows anything after Mendoza
research_notes.where_it_goes: Round 1 starts 8 PM ET on ESPN/ABC. Expect trades, surprises, and chaos after the obvious #1 pick.
meme_angles: Fernando Mendoza from Cal backup to #1 overall in one transfer
Cowboys dysfunction continues with Pickens standoff

stories.headline: Mike Vrabel Steps Away From Patriots for Counseling After Dianna Russini Photos
stories.editorial_direction: Report the facts professionally. Vrabel missing Day 3 of draft (Saturday) to seek counseling after photos surfaced of him with former Athletic reporter at Arizona resort. Both married to others. Russini resigned. No commentary on the scandal itself.

tweets.text:
New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, per ESPN's @MikeReiss.

More: https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48566969/mike-vrabel-seek-counseling-not-patriots-day-3-nfl-draft

News story: Mike Vrabel won't be with Patriots for Day 3 of draft, as he seeks counseling.

https://www.espn.com/nfl/story/_/id/48566969/mike-vrabel-seek-counseling-not-patriots-day-3-nfl-draft

timeline: Photos published by Page Six earlier this month showing Vrabel and Russini holding hands at Arizona resort
Both initially denied wrongdoing, called interaction 'completely innocent'
Russini resigned from The Athletic April 14 amid internal investigation
Vrabel addressed team Monday, media Tuesday for first time
key_quotes: 'I promised my family, this organization and this team that I was going to give them the best version of me'
'We never want our actions to negatively affect the team'
context: Both are married to other people with children
Vrabel is Patriots Hall of Famer as player, second season as coach
Led Patriots to Super Bowl LX last season (lost to Seahawks)
NFL said it won't investigate under personal conduct policy
research_notes.draft_impact: Will be with team for Rounds 1-2-3 (Thursday-Friday), absent for Rounds 4-7 on Saturday

stories.headline: Thunder Take 2-0 Lead But Lose Jalen Williams to Injury
stories.editorial_direction: SGA was brilliant (37 points), Thunder now 10-0 in first round games with this core, but Jalen Williams left with hamstring injury in 3rd quarter. Mix the dominance with the concern.

tweets.text:
SGA in Game 2 vs Phoenix:

37 PTS
5 REB
9 AST
2 STL

Leading all players in playoff PTS over the last three seasons.

Chet in Game 2 vs Phoenix:

19 PTS
8 REB
4 BLK
7-12 FG

Only Serge Ibaka has more blocks in his first three playoff runs for the Thunder.

"Great answer, Chet. Snitches get stitches." 😭

—Shaq after Chuck asked Chet Holmgren about Jalen Williams' hamstring injury in Game 2.

dominant_performance: Thunder now 10-0 in first round games with young core
Average margin of victory: 18.9 points in those 10 games
sga_brilliance: Leading all players in playoff scoring last 3 seasons
supporting_cast: Only Serge Ibaka has more blocks in first 3 playoff runs for Thunder
injury_concern: Jalen Williams left in 3rd quarter with left hamstring injury
Had 19 points on 7-11 shooting before injury
Status for rest of series unclear
research_notes.series_outlook: Thunder can complete sweep with 2 home games remaining. Suns showed more fight (107 points vs 84 in Game 1) but not enough.

stories.headline: Devin Booker Calls Out Ref by Name: 'It's Bad for the Sport'
stories.editorial_direction: Booker torched referee James Williams by name, said people will view NBA as WWE. Dillon Brooks piled on. Both frustrated by officiating in Game 2 loss.

tweets.text:
Devin Booker just WENT OFF on the NBA refs in the post game press conference:

"It's definitely something that has to be looked at. I heard (Alex) Caruso tell them to call the tech and he ended up doing it. In my 11 years, I haven't called a ref out by name, but James (Williams) was terrible tonight, through and through. It's bad for the sport, bad for the integrity of the sport. People are going to start viewing this as the WWE if they're not held responsible."

"I know I haven't won a championship in this league but I have been in it for 11 years now, so to get to this point to be treated like that, for me to even be saying something out loud, it's bad. It's my first time in 11 years but it's needed. Whatever, I get fined for it, everybody can pull the clips and see where the frustration comes from."

"Ya'll should be interviewing the officials... That should be a new thing in the NBA. Officials got to explain themselves because it's getting ridiculous. No control out there. Now they're just whistling on one side." 

-Dillon Brooks

(via @DuaneRankin)

booker_explosion: First time calling out ref by name in 11-year career
Said James Williams was 'terrible tonight, through and through'
Compared NBA to WWE if refs not held accountable
brooks_addition: Wants officials to do post-game press conferences
'Now they're just whistling on one side'
research_notes.context: Both players frustrated after 120-107 loss puts them down 2-0 in series they're likely to lose anyway

stories.headline: Keldon Johnson Wins 6MOY After Breaking Manu's Spurs Record
stories.editorial_direction: Johnson set Spurs franchise record with 1,081 bench points. Only the second player ever (with Dell Curry 1994) to play all 82 games without starting a single one and win 6MOY.

tweets.text:
Keldon Johnson's ranks off the bench this season:

PTS — 2nd
REB — 2nd
+/- — 4th

Sixth Man of the Year.

The only 6MOYs to play all 82 without starting a single game:

— Dell Curry in '94

and Keldon Johnson in '26.

"Go out back and kill something and cook a nice meal." 😂

Chuck to Keldon Johnson after winning Sixth Man of the Year 😅

research_notes.record_breaking: Set Spurs franchise record with 1,081 bench points, breaking Manu Ginobili's mark
research_notes.historic_achievement: Only 2nd player ever (Dell Curry 1994) to play all 82 games without starting once and win 6MOY
research_notes.chuck_quote: Charles Barkley's hunting advice is perfect for the Texas crowd

around_the_league.text:
Cowboys EVP Stephen Jones told reporters today that they've decided WR George Pickens will play on the franchise tag this season, and there won't be talks on a long-term deal.

Pickens has not signed the tag yet.
Alabama has reached a new seven-year contract with football coach Kalen DeBoer that will pay him $12.5 million per season, the university announced Wednesday.

Adam Silver prefers LeBron James to retire when the league feels ready, not when LeBron decides. 

(Via @LakersLead)

Drake Baldwin this season (ranks on his team):

33 hits (1st)
23 runs batted in (1st)
7 home runs (t-1st)
.391 on-base percentage (2nd)
.320 batting average (3rd)
.563 slugging percentage (3rd)

He's one of only three players with 30 H, 5 HR and 20 RBI this season.

Cade Cunningham in Game 2 vs Orlando:

27 PTS
6 REB
11 AST
11-19 FG

Averaging 33 PPG in the playoffs this season.

Victor Wembanyama's concussion symptoms didn't worsen, and he was able to participate in cardio work today, per @ShamsCharania.

He hopes to travel with the team to Portland but his status for Game 3 is in jeopardy.

Angel Reese boyfriend out here locking up her ex boyfriend lmaooo 

She definitely posting this on IG 😂🤣

Colgate transfer Jalen Cox has committed to USC, per Daniel Green of @GSEworldwide.

Averaged 17.9 PPG, 5.3 APG, and 5.2 RPG last season.

Fun Fact: Jalen Green averages the most PPG (38.0) in Game 2s in NBA history. 

How many for Jalen tonight?
I've seen like 15 tweets about Goldfinger possibly leaving but maybe not but also he might leave. He's gotta just make up his mind

closer.hook: The chaos of draft night meets the chaos of sports Twitter
